rationale: Error message improvement for hash key BSON serialization; no spec rule governs exception message text.
Documentation of BSON::Document []= return value quirk; API documentation bug, no spec involvement.
Adding value accessor to Int32/Int64 Ruby objects; API ergonomics, spec does not prescribe this accessor.
Constructor ergonomics improvement; spec does not dictate how Int32/Int64 constructors handle same-type inputs.
Legacy retry mode improvement; retryable reads spec covers modern mode only, not legacy behavior.
find/getMore/killCursors spec requires 64-bit cursor IDs; driver encoded small values as 32-bit integers.
Same 64-bit cursor ID spec violation as RUBY-1980 but for killCursors command encoding.
Off-by-one in legacy retry attempt counter; internal display bug, no spec rule about attempt numbering.
Converting SDAM monitoring spec test matchers to verifiers for better assertion output; test runner improvement.
SDAM spec pseudocode defines server type methods; driver had Ruby-specific custom primary detection logic instead.
SDAM server type determination wrong for direct connection with driver/node address mismatch; server shows OTHER.
Internal improvement to session support tracking in topology objects; no specific violated spec rule.
Internal refactor consolidating get_session/with_session; explicitly no behavior change.
CI mlaunch configuration hardcodes server version; CI configuration bug, no driver behavior.
API documentation error: Database#command return type documented as Hash instead of Operation::Result.
Adding mmap/server 3.4 Evergreen CI configuration; CI coverage addition, no spec.
Auth spec prohibits authentication against arbiters; driver needed to enforce server-type restriction per DRIVERS-753.
Improvement to auth exception message to include server address; spec does not govern exception message content.
Testing auth exception message includes auth source; not about spec-defined protocol behavior.
SCRAM spec requires credential caching per DRIVERS-343; driver was missing this required behavior.
Updating mongos pinning spec test to use different error code for unpinning per DRIVERS-764.
Ruby frozen string error during BSON::Binary serialization; Ruby language-specific mutability bug, no spec rule.
Driver sends null pwd field in createUser for X.509 auth; X.509 uses no password, spec violation.
Ruby 2.7 compatibility fix for deprecated URI.decode method; language version compatibility issue.
Test failure due to Ruby keyword argument syntax change on ruby-head; CI compatibility bug.
Upsert option not sent to legacy servers due to symbol/string key mismatch; CRUD spec requires upsert to work.
Dependency version conflict causing Ruby version requirement regression; packaging issue.
CSFLE binding not reloaded after LIBMONGOCRYPT_PATH fix; internal state management bug, no spec rule.
Internal refactor optimizing FFI byte string conversion; no behavior change, no spec involvement.
Refactoring FLE crypto hook code to separate concerns; internal refactor with no behavior change.
Updating SDAM spec runner to handle multiple test phases per DRIVERS-633; spec runner improvement.
Refactoring FLE binding to use Ruby objects internally vs FFI pointers; internal refactor.
Extended JSON 2.0 spec defines $regularExpression key; driver used obsoleted legacy $regexp key.
Better error message when auth_source is empty; dev experience improvement, no spec rule about error text.
BSON spec defines symbol and int64 types; driver could not correctly round-trip these through bson/extended JSON.
Description states driver is not obligated to support $ref; optional feature implementation.
Extended JSON spec defines $dbPointer type; driver was missing this required BSON type for round-tripping.
bson-ruby build failure on Windows; packaging/build issue, no spec involvement.
Restoring legacy extended JSON corpus test data files to spec/spec_tests/data/corpus_legacy.
Reinstating legacy extended JSON Binary serialization for backwards compatibility; not spec-defined required behavior.
Syncing bson corpus spec test files to current upstream format; spec test file update.
Extended JSON spec defines parsing rules for canonical/relaxed modes; driver lacked compliant parser.
Extended JSON spec requires specific serialization; to_json didn't follow spec for Float Infinity/NaN values.
Adding driver-specific spec tests for legacy $regex parsing not covered by upstream bson corpus.
Symbol decrypted as string in CSFLE; BSON type should be preserved through encryption/decryption. Empty description.
Client construction crashes on duplicate seed addresses; robustness bug, no specific spec rule violated.
Adding stack trace to ismaster failure log output; observability improvement, no spec rule.
Architecture improvement to use per-connection server descriptions; no specific spec rule contradicted.
Rack::Session::SessionId object missing bson_type; Ruby ecosystem integration issue, not BSON spec.
Adding compression integration test; not YAML spec test runner infrastructure.
